channel.title: Compliance on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Compliance on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Backup for Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Backup for Cosmos DB is now in public preview. It adds vaulted backups for Cosmos DB accounts to support cyber-resiliency, compliance, and isolated backup storage.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Confidential Compute support on Azure Container Apps
item.description:
Azure Container Apps now generally supports Confidential Compute for regulated or sensitive containerized workloads. The feature adds stronger isolation and protection for data while it is being processed.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot data residency in US + EU and FedRAMP compliance now available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now supports data residency in US and EU regions, keeping inference processing and related data within the selected geography. It also adds FedRAMP compliance for US government customers.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Data Box enhances compliance with automatic Secure Erasure Certificates
item.description:
Azure Data Box now automatically provides a downloadable Secure Erasure Certificate for each completed order. The certificate verifies the device data was securely erased according to NIST 800-88 Revision 2.

  • Source: Azure Updates
